name: davidwyly/rxn
description: Rxn — an opinionated, PSR-15-native JSON-only API micro-framework for PHP 8.2+. Schema-compiled DTO binding, RFC 7807 default.

suggest.davidwyly/rxn-orm: ^0.1 — Rxn's query builder + ActiveRecord-shaped layer. Lives in a separate package so the framework itself stays narrow; install it when you reach for the data / model layer.
suggest.davidwyly/rxn-observe: ^0.1 — OpenTelemetry / observability listeners for the framework's PSR-14 event surface (`Rxn\Framework\Observability\Event\*`). Drop the `OpenTelemetryListener` in and every request emits a span tree (root request → middleware children → handler), with binder + validation as span events.
suggest.psr/simple-cache: ^3.0 — required only when using `Psr16IdempotencyStore` to plug an existing PSR-16 cache (Redis / Memcached / APCu) into the Idempotency middleware. Apps using `FileIdempotencyStore` (the default) don't need this.
